message:
Add Microsoft Edge fallback for Windows

Chrome is not installed by default on Windows, but Edge is pre-installed
on Windows 10/11. Since Edge is Chromium-based and fully supports the
Chrome DevTools Protocol, add Edge paths as fallback options on Windows.

This improves the out-of-box experience for Windows users who can now
use the tool immediately without installing Chrome.

Tested on Windows 11 ARM64 with Edge 142.0.3595.80.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
